validators.name: public CodeRabbit full-range implementation review
validators.summary: Iterative isolated reviews and the public review resolved sixteen distinct actionable findings; the final reviewed tree is byte-identical to the public implementation tree, every public review thread is resolved, and CodeRabbit returned a passing status.

validators.name: independent security review chain
validators.summary: No critical or high-severity vulnerability was found; authority, committed-source, adapter-output, tenant-isolation, telemetry, and dependency boundaries were mechanically corroborated.

validators.name: immutable public closure candidate review
validators.summary: Protocol v2 requires a separate review of the exact candidate commit after this non-authoritative package is published to main.

themes: truthful semantic deltas and conservative rename inference
overload, relation ownership, and supersession preservation
configuration-aware adapter reuse and canonical array ordering
TypeScript variable export ownership and fingerprints

acceptance.criterion: only exact committed Git objects and bounded supported files enter indexing
Go, TypeScript and JavaScript, and Python adapters produce validated deterministic evidence
unchanged inputs replay to byte-identical artifacts, IDs, and receipts
incremental reuse and invalidation follow exact source, configuration, and proven dependency evidence
PostgreSQL recomputes canonical semantic deltas and preserves tenant and repository authority
rollback refuses canonical-history destruction and succeeds for an empty Sprint 08 schema
